reviews.author: Aman Singh
reviews.review_body: The school has world class infrastructure and facilities for students with highly qualified teachers to guide the young minds.

reviews.school_name: Salvation Tree School - SEC 3, NOIDA EXTENSION
reviews.author: Anjali Jha
reviews.review_body:
I MUKESH JHA THE PARENT OF NIDHI JHA STUDYING IN XI CLAY WOULD LIKE TO SHARE MY VIEWS ON THE ANNUAL DAY OF 2024
"THIS YEAR ANNUAL DAY WAS AMAZING , PERFOMANCES WERE INCREDIBLE AND THE MANAGEMENT WAS SO GOOD "
SHE PRACTICED  FOR HER PERFORMANCE UNDER THE GUIDANCE OF KUMUD MA'AM, RAKESH SIR, AND SINTHUJA MA'AM . THEY ALL HELPED HER IN POLISHING HER PERFORMANCE .
THANK YOU SO MUCH TEACHERS AND PRINCIPAL FOR THIS WONDERFUL EVENT....

reviews.school_name: Salvation Tree School - SEC 3, NOIDA EXTENSION
reviews.author: ABHIGYAN MANIT JHA
reviews.review_body: The teachers here at Salvation tree school are highly skilled and dedicated, ensuring that every student gets individual attention. Their teaching approach blends academics with extracurricular activities, fostering creativity, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills in students.

reviews.school_name: Salvation Tree School - SEC 3, NOIDA EXTENSION
reviews.author: Mayank Yadav
reviews.review_body: I would definitely recommend this school to all the kids who require personal attention and individual improvement. I am quite satisfied with the environment, teachers and the management. I have never ever met a principal so humble. The teaching staff is quite supportive

reviews.school_name: Salvation Tree School - SEC 3, NOIDA EXTENSION
reviews.author: Anushka Singh
reviews.review_body:
The event was wonderfully organized, and everything was excellent!
The performances, planning, and overall coordination were truly commendable, and it was evident that a lot of effort went into making the event a success.

Thank you for an amazing event!

reviews.school_name: Salvation Tree School - SEC 3, NOIDA EXTENSION
reviews.author: Astha Parashar
reviews.review_body:
I'm very satisfied with the school. My daughter is studying in salvation tree school from kg class and now she is in class 5th . Our experience for this annual function was Awesome.
*Really great team performance . 🤟Kudos to all the teachers and management working tirelessly behind the scenes on nurturing these precious kids* 🙏

reviews.school_name: Salvation Tree School - SEC 3, NOIDA EXTENSION
reviews.author: Dhruv Aryan
reviews.review_body: school's extraordinary spirit and make it stand out as a light of quality and inspiration. It was a day that honored the skills and hard work of each student and instructor, from the exquisitely staged performances to the thought-provoking comments. We are honored to be a part of this school because of the commitment of our teachers and the management's support, which was visible in every little aspect. The support and opportunities offered here inspire me as a student, and the yearly event served as a reminder of why our school is simply  more than a place to learn—it's a place where dreams come true.

reviews.school_name: Salvation Tree School - SEC 3, NOIDA EXTENSION
reviews.author: Roopa Bohra
reviews.review_body: The annual day function received high praise for its outstanding performances and dedication of both students and teachers.

reviews.school_name: Salvation Tree School - SEC 3, NOIDA EXTENSION
reviews.author: sushil sharma
reviews.review_body: The school is really a good place to enroll your child . I must say the teachers are very good they are so understanding.

reviews.school_name: Salvation Tree School - SEC 3, NOIDA EXTENSION
reviews.author: Amar Dhingra
reviews.review_body: A very good school ,very enthusiastic staff .The are working for the progress of every child with using different academics and non academics activities.very happy n satisfied.
